name: Live TV
author: My Media Vault
description: Free live TV from the public iptv-org playlists (like the USA TV / StreamFire channel lists). Browse thousands of channels by country or category, or search by name. Streams are HLS and play through the built-in player.

settings.label: Search countries
settings.description: Comma-separated country codes searched when you type a channel name (e.g. us,uk,ca,au). Browsing still reaches every country.
